fixtures.spec_section: JCS canonicalization (RFC 8785) for delegation receipts; bilateral receipt envelope §4 / §6
CTEF v0.3.1 cryptographic agent identity; inference-session validity windows + sequence bounds
AIVSS §3.6 worked scenarios — OWASP Agentic AI Core risks AAI001–AAI010
String-concatenation preimage failure class. Mirrored from corpollc/qntm#15. Deep verification in runners/ts/canonical-bytes-qntm-v0.3.2.test.ts.

Accountability record v0.1: boundary decision (allow/deny/halt) plus execution status; shape derived from decisionReceipt/execution-envelope and action_ref; detached-payload digest; Ed25519 over JCS. Includes tampered-payload and wrong-key negatives.

read_fidelity_receipt v0.1: sampled readback challenge over perceived content; Ed25519 over JCS; seed = sha256(JCS of content_digest, presentation_digest, nonce, version); word_digest_handle checksum. Deep verification in fixtures/read-fidelity-receipt/verify.ts and validate.py. Includes replayed-nonce, presentation-mismatch, tampered-digest, out-of-lexicon, and transposition negatives.
